findings:
  - { id: judged-not-resurfaced-mark-fixed, kind: judged, text: "ac-3 requires a not-resurfaced entry to persist \"until a human explicitly marks it fixed\", but no sanctioned exit ramp exists for the primary ac-3 shape — a finding absent from the fresh run. The disposition verb (cmd/verdi/disposition.go runDisposition) searches only decoded.Findings for the target id and exits 1 \"finding not found\" when the id lives solely in not-resurfaced:; findNotResurfacedIndex is consulted only after a live findings: entry is located, so removal happens exclusively via the candidate-confirmation path, which requires the slug to resurface in a fresh judge run. A finding that never resurfaces persists in not-resurfaced: indefinitely — and its accepted-deviation identity is permanently pinned into the spec-stale and feature-close budgets — with the only escape being a hand-edit of the report, exactly the unsanctioned flow the disposition verb (D6-25) exists to replace. The persistence half of ac-3 is implemented and proven; the explicit human mark-fixed half is not implemented. (confidence 0.72)" }

A finding that never resurfaces persists in not-resurfaced: indefinitely — and its accepted-deviation identity is permanently pinned into the spec-stale and feature-close budgets — with the only escape being a hand-edit of the report, exactly the unsanctioned flow the disposition verb (D6-25) exists to replace. The persistence half of ac-3 is implemented and proven; the explicit human mark-fixed half is not implemented.\",\"confidence\":0.72}]}\n```" }

# Alignment report

## Computed

(none)

### Boundary diff vs acceptance baseline

(no impacted services)

### Diagram alignment

- (no accepted proposals)
- (no illustrative diagrams in this spec's body)

## Judged

- **judged-not-resurfaced-mark-fixed** [UNDISPOSITIONED]: ac-3 requires a not-resurfaced entry to persist "until a human explicitly marks it fixed", but no sanctioned exit ramp exists for the primary ac-3 shape — a finding absent from the fresh run. The disposition verb (cmd/verdi/disposition.go runDisposition) searches only decoded.Findings for the target id and exits 1 "finding not found" when the id lives solely in not-resurfaced:; findNotResurfacedIndex is consulted only after a live findings: entry is located, so removal happens exclusively via the candidate-confirmation path, which requires the slug to resurface in a fresh judge run. A finding that never resurfaces persists in not-resurfaced: indefinitely — and its accepted-deviation identity is permanently pinned into the spec-stale and feature-close budgets — with the only escape being a hand-edit of the report, exactly the unsanctioned flow the disposition verb (D6-25) exists to replace. The persistence half of ac-3 is implemented and proven; the explicit human mark-fixed half is not implemented. (confidence 0.72)

### Candidates awaiting reaffirmation

(none)

(none)
